item.title: Just became a father to the most beautiful baby girl. Hospital didn\u2019t let me spend the night with her and my wife so now I\u2019m home and can\u2019t sleep. Wish my luck on this Wednesdsy my dudes

item.title: I remember when Bucky became Cap in the comics. People didn't like it but the story was so good that people didn't mind him keeping the name permanently.

item.title: I remember when Bucky became Cap in the comics. People didn't like it but the story was so good that people didn't mind him keeping the name permanently.
item.description: I remember when Bucky became Cap in the comics. People didn't like it but the story was so good that people didn't mind him keeping the name permanently.

item.title: Just became a father to the most beautiful baby girl. Hospital didn\u2019t let me spend the night with her and my wife so now I\u2019m home and can\u2019t sleep. Wish my luck on this Wednesdsy my dudes
item.description: Just became a father to the most beautiful baby girl. Hospital didn\u2019t let me spend the night with her and my wife so now I\u2019m home and can\u2019t sleep. Wish my luck on this Wednesdsy my dudes

item.title: Thank you all who supported us through this racist platform. F*** you all and see you tomorow
item.description: Thank you all who supported us through this racist platform. F*** you all and see you tomorow

item.title: The worse thing about social media is that it taught people that their opinions mean anything.
item.description: The worse thing about social media is that it taught people that their opinions mean anything.
